text:
Once upon a late autumn afternoon, there was a quirky cat named Mittens. Mittens had strikingly pink noses and ears. She lived atop a little cottage, surrounded by vines and flowers that smelled sweetly. One rainy day, Mittens lay curled inside the library chair reading a book about clouds.

Suddenly, her tail twitched. Outside, a gust blew through the window. Mittens peeked out. There before her was a curious rabbit wearing goggles. It danced around nervously.

"Why do you wear those?" Mittens asked softly.

The rabbit giggled nervously. "Oh! For my treasure hunt! I've been searching everywhere! It's my very first pair!"

Mittens watched amusedly. Inside his pocket heaved an oddly-shaped box.

"What's inside?" she probed.

"I think…" he paused. "Cookies?" His eyes glittered.

Mittens reached out. One cookie vanished. Another did too. Then another.

"This tastes amazing!" he declared
